Who We Are

Built on Integrity, Rooted in Tucson

Stark Fence Co. started with a simple mission: to provide Tucson homeowners and businesses with fences built to last. Founded by lifelong Tucson resident, Mark Stark, our company has grown from a small operation to a team of dedicated professionals, all committed to quality workmanship and customer satisfaction.

We believe in doing things right the first time. From the initial consultation to the final inspection, we prioritize clear communication, meticulous attention to detail, and the use of premium materials. Our goal is to exceed your expectations and deliver a fence that not only enhances your property but also provides lasting security and peace of mind.

Stark Fence Co. is proud to be a part of the Tucson community. We actively support local organizations and strive to contribute to the growth and prosperity of our city. When you choose Stark Fence Co., you're not just getting a fence; you're investing in a local business that cares about its neighbors.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Stark Fence Co

Durable Materials

We use only the highest-quality materials designed to withstand the harsh Tucson climate, ensuring your fence lasts for years to come.

Expert Installation

Our experienced team provides professional installation services, ensuring your fence is properly installed and functions flawlessly.

Custom Solutions

We offer a wide range of fence styles and materials to meet your specific needs and complement your property's aesthetic.

Local Expertise

As a Tucson-based company, we understand the unique challenges of fencing in the desert environment and provide tailored solutions.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Stark Fence Co. did an amazing job installing our new wood fence. The team was professional, efficient, and the fence looks beautiful. It really adds to the privacy of our backyard. Highly recommend!

Maria G. Wood Fencing
“

We needed a chain link fence for our dog run, and Stark Fence Co. provided a great solution at a reasonable price. The installation was quick, and the fence is very sturdy. Exactly what we needed.

David S. Chain Link Fencing
“

The wrought iron fence Stark Fence Co. installed is absolutely stunning! It really elevates the look of our property. The craftsmanship is impeccable, and the team was a pleasure to work with. They handled the desert landscaping concerns perfectly.

Laura K. Wrought Iron Fencing
“

Our gate was sagging and difficult to open. Stark Fence Co. came out and fixed it quickly and efficiently. The technician was knowledgeable and friendly. Great service!

Robert P. Gate Installation & Repair
“

We chose vinyl fencing for its low maintenance, and Stark Fence Co. delivered. The fence looks great, and we don't have to worry about painting or staining. The installation team was professional and courteous.

Susan L. Vinyl Fencing
“

After a monsoon storm, part of our fence was damaged. Stark Fence Co. came out promptly and repaired it quickly and effectively. We were very impressed with their responsiveness and quality of work.

Michael B. Fence Repair

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How long will a wood fence last in Tucson's climate?
With proper treatment and maintenance, a wood fence from Stark Fence Co. can last 10-15 years in Tucson.
What type of wood is best for fencing in Tucson?
Pressure-treated pine is a durable and cost-effective option for wood fencing in our climate. It resists rot and insect damage.
How often should I stain or seal my wood fence?
We recommend staining or sealing your wood fence every 2-3 years to protect it from the sun and moisture.
